items.example: My grandmother has always been my role model.
She is an inspiration to young people everywhere.
I admire people who work hard to achieve their dreams.
Many young athletes look up to professional players.
It took years of hard work to achieve her goals.
Everyone has to find their own path in life.
Setting clear goals is the first step to success.
A good teacher knows how to motivate their students.
She is passionate about helping underprivileged children.
Steve Jobs was a visionary who changed the way we use technology.
